anticipated_impacts: Numbers in the narrative (e.g., W4 residual, compensable days, net damages) may change after correct window arithmetic and concurrency testing are applied.
Improved auditability should raise ri_2 and ri_3 scores and resolve minor weaknesses noted in ri_1 and ri_6.
verification_strategy: All narrative figures will be sourced from named ranges in the workbook.
Checks sheet must be all PASS before finalizing the revised deliverables.

planned_changes: Add Baseline_CPM sheet with ES/EF/LS/LF/TF formulas, critical path flagging, and checks confirming 330-day duration and alignment with 2026-03-31.

Create Windows_W1-Windows_W4 sheets with: (a) event inputs; (b) owner_toggle and contractor_toggle; (c) pre_finish and post_finish calculations; (d) finish_owner_only, finish_contractor_only, finish_both; (e) net window delta and concurrency allocation per rubric.
Add Windows_Index summary table rolling up each window's pre/post finishes, net delta, and allocations (owner/contractor/neutral/concurrent) with links to the window tabs.
Implement an Audit_Trails sheet mapping every event_id to its window, pre/post finish, delta, allocation category, and a direct link to Apportionment_By_Window totals.
Correct W4 residual arithmetic to ensure SUM(Window_Deltas) equals 89; document any mitigation offsets within the window tables and Reconciliation rows.
Build Apportionment_By_Window to sum allocations across windows and drive EOT and category totals strictly via cell references from Windows_Index/Audit_Trails.
Construct a Damages sheet referencing apportionment totals and contract rates; add checks confirming concurrent days are excluded from compensable time.
Add per-window Gantt/timeline visuals to illustrate overlapping critical impacts supporting concurrency determinations.
Introduce a README_Method sheet documenting calendar basis, OE2 trigger rule with an explicit formula example, window boundaries, recomputation steps, and mitigation modeling for M1/M2.
Expose key formulas via a Formulas_Map area using FORMULATEXT for baseline path cells and window pre/post finish cells to enable review without external parsers.

Add a Checks sheet: baseline duration = 330; SUM(Window_Deltas) = 89; per-window category sums equal window delta; global apportionment sum = 89; compensable excludes concurrent; calculation mode = automatic. All checks to return PASS.
Revise expert_report_summary.md to correct W4 residual, update apportionment and damages per the recalculated workbook, and cite workbook cell references for each reported figure.

metadata_json.revision_goal: Good overall structure and method alignment. Workbook formulas and audit trails are not exposed for verification.
